headline: These S&P500 stocks that are showing activity before the opening bell on Monday.
summary: The US market session of Monday has yet to be opened, let's have a look at the top S&P500 gainers and losers in the pre-market session today.

headline: Stressed by the price of car insurance? These tips can help lower costs
summary: If car insurance is straining your budget, try shopping around before taking more drastic steps.
